candidates.why: Header/section label for revenue, but no values shown; prefer populated, specific revenue line.

candidates.why: Excludes depreciation/amortization and therefore best matches direct production/service costs without D&A.

Excludes depreciation but may still include amortization; still close to direct cost concept.

variables.notes: Preferred the component line over totals. It appears to represent the direct cost bucket excluding separate depreciation and amortization rows.

candidates.why: Overhead bucket candidate, but generic and duplicated by total elsewhere; less preferred than explicit SG&A line.

Non-operating, not SG&A.

candidates.why: Most direct interest expense line; preferred under rule.

candidates.why: Lease-interest subset only; not total interest expense.
